final:
module dram_cell(
    input [8-1:1-1] data_in,
    input [2:0] addr,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory [0:7]; // 8 cells, each 8 bits

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write operation
        end else begin
            data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule
